$comment: scripts/Route15Gate2F.asm — Oak's aide: the EXP.ALL at 50 owned species. (Faithful single apostrophes; the retired adapter doubled them.)

commands.name: oaks_aide
args:
EXP.ALL gives
EXP points to all
the POKéMON with
you, even if they
don't fight. It does, however,
reduce the amount
of EXP for each
POKéMON. If you don't need
it, you should
store it via PC.
